description: Create visualization comparing SSZ1 active site residues and domain architecture to canonical Hsp70 ATPases
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1.5, 1]})

# === Panel A: Active site residue comparison ===
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_title("A. Hsp70 ATPase Active Site: SSZ1 vs Canonical Hsp70s", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=10)

# Data: critical residues comparison
proteins = ['DnaK\n(E. coli)', 'SSA1\n(yeast)', 'SSB1\n(yeast)', 'SSZ1\n(yeast)']
# Key positions: DLGTT loop, catalytic elements
motifs = {
    'Phosphate loop\n(DLGTT)': ['IDLGTT', 'IDLGTT', 'IDLGTT', 'ITFGNT'],
    'Catalytic loop\n(xFDLGGG)': ['IFDLGGGT', 'IFDLGGGT', 'IFDLGGGT', 'ADFGGIRS'],
    'ATPase\nactivity': ['YES', 'YES', 'YES', 'NO'],
    'ATP binding': ['YES', 'YES', 'YES', 'YES\n(weak)'],
}

# Create a table-like visualization
cell_colors = []
cell_text = []
for motif_name, values in motifs.items():
    row_colors = []
    for i, val in enumerate(values):
        if i < 3:  # canonical
            if 'YES' in str(val):
                row_colors.append('#90EE90')  # light green
            else:
                row_colors.append('#E8F5E9')  # very light green
        else:  # SSZ1
            if 'NO' in str(val) or val != values[0]:
                row_colors.append('#FFCDD2')  # light red
            else:
                row_colors.append('#90EE90')
    cell_colors.append(row_colors)
    cell_text.append(values)

table = ax.table(cellText=cell_text,
                 rowLabels=list(motifs.keys()),
                 colLabels=proteins,
                 cellColours=cell_colors,
                 rowColours=['#E3F2FD']*4,
                 colColours=['#E3F2FD']*4,
                 loc='center',
                 cellLoc='center')

table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(11)
table.scale(1, 2.2)

# Style header cells
for (row, col), cell in table.get_celld().items():
    if row == 0 or col == -1:
        cell.set_text_props(fontweight='bold')
    cell.set_edgecolor('#BDBDBD')

ax.axis('off')

# === Panel B: Domain architecture comparison ===
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title("B. Domain Architecture Comparison", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=10)

# Draw domain diagrams
y_positions = [3.5, 2.5, 1.5, 0.5]
labels = ['DnaK (638 aa)', 'SSA1 (642 aa)', 'SSB1 (613 aa)', 'SSZ1 (537 aa)']
# NBD (ATPase domain), Linker, SBDβ, SBDα (lid)
# Canonical Hsp70: NBD ~1-385, Linker ~386-393, SBDβ ~394-507, SBDα ~508-end
domains_canonical = [
    {'NBD': (0, 385), 'Linker': (385, 393), 'SBDβ': (393, 507), 'SBDα': (507, 638)},
    {'NBD': (0, 382), 'Linker': (382, 393), 'SBDβ': (393, 520), 'SBDα': (520, 642)},
    {'NBD': (0, 388), 'Linker': (388, 399), 'SBDβ': (399, 513), 'SBDα': (513, 613)},
    {'NBD': (0, 399), 'Linker': None, 'SBDβ': (399, 537), 'SBDα': None},  # SSZ1: truncated SBD, no lid
]

domain_colors = {'NBD': '#4FC3F7', 'Linker': '#FFE082', 'SBDβ': '#81C784', 'SBDα': '#E57373'}
max_len = 650
scale = 12.0 / max_len

for i, (y, label, domains) in enumerate(zip(y_positions, labels, domains_canonical)):
    ax2.text(-0.5, y, label, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
    for dname, coords in domains.items():
        if coords is None:
            continue
        start, end = coords
        width = (end - start) * scale
        x = start * scale
        color = domain_colors[dname]
        if i == 3:  # SSZ1
            if dname == 'NBD':
                # Striped pattern for "ATPase-dead" NBD
                rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y-0.2), width, 0.4, 
                    boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor=color, edgecolor='red', 
                    linewidth=2, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
            elif dname == 'SBDβ':
                rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y-0.2), width, 0.4,
                    boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor=color, edgecolor='red',
                    linewidth=2, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
            else:
                rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y-0.2), width, 0.4,
                    boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor=color, edgecolor='gray',
                    linewidth=1, alpha=0.8)
        else:
            rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y-0.2), width, 0.4,
                boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor=color, edgecolor='gray',
                linewidth=1, alpha=0.8)
        ax2.add_patch(rect)
        # Add domain label
        mid_x = x + width/2
        if width > 0.5:
            ax2.text(mid_x, y, dname, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# Add annotations for SSZ1
ax2.annotate('ATPase-dead\n(D→T in DLGTT)', xy=(2, 0.5), xytext=(3, -0.5),
            fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold',
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5),
            ha='center')
ax2.annotate('Truncated\n(no SBDα lid)', xy=(9, 0.5), xytext=(10.5, -0.5),
            fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold',
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5),
            ha='center')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#4FC3F7', edgecolor='gray', label='NBD (ATPase domain)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFE082', edgecolor='gray', label='Linker'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#81C784', edgecolor='gray', label='SBDβ (substrate binding)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#E57373', edgecolor='gray', label='SBDα (lid)'),
]
ax2.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='upper right', fontsize=8, framealpha=0.9)

ax2.set_xlim(-4, 13)
ax2.set_ylim(-1.2, 4.5)
ax2.axis('off')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('ssz1_active_site_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: ssz1_active_site_comparison.png")
